rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a broad literature-positioning sentence, where the author notes that his contest model has similarities to other contest settings, including sweepstakes design. The citing paper does not use Kalra and Shi (2010) to build hypotheses, derive the focal social comparison mechanism, or set up the experimental design. The substantive theoretical benchmark in this article is Kalra and Shi (2001), not the 2010 sweepstakes paper, so this citation functions as peripheral context rather than a meaningful dependency.
